message:
✨ Add empty state handling for dashboard cards (#10827)

Add proper empty state rendering to three dashboard cards that previously
showed blank or minimal content when no data was available:

- ServiceStatus: shows CardEmptyState with Globe icon when no services exist
- NodeConditions: shows CardEmptyState with Server icon when no nodes exist
- NetworkPolicyCoverage: shows CardEmptyState with Shield icon when no pods exist

All cards now use the shared CardEmptyState component and useCardLoadingState
showEmptyState flag, consistent with other cards like AppStatus and
ArgoCDApplications.

Adds i18n translation keys for empty state titles and messages in both
cards.json and common.json.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
